items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 10 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「Single-Rollout Asynchronous Optimization for Agentic Reinforcement Learning」、「NVIDIA Nemotron Achieves Benchmark-Leading Performance With LangChain Deep Agents Harness」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.title: Single-Rollout Asynchronous Optimization for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is becoming increasingly important for post-training large language models (LLMs). Previous RL pipelines for LLMs were mostly synchronous and batch-interleaved, which is inefficient for long-horizon agentic tasks. Recently, asynchronous RL has emerged…
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「大模型训练、推理、RAG、后训练或评测」。原文摘要显示：A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.
items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。
